creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Budnick from comment #0)
> math/mate-calc port has been deleted, Portmaster -advw fails
> 
> ===>>> Initial dependency check complete for x11/mate-session-manager
> 
> ===>>> Continuing initial dependency check for x11/mate-base
> ===>>> Initial dependency check complete for x11/mate-base
> 
> ===>>> Returning to update check of installed ports
> 
> ===>>> mate-calc-1.8.0_1
> 
> ===>>> The math/mate-calc port has been deleted: Not part of MATE 1.10.
> Instead galculator is used
> ===>>> Aborting update
> 
> What can I do to upgrade the ports?

Tell portmaster(8) to use a different port when it encounters mate-calc:

-o	_new port dir in /usr/ports_ _installed	port_
	 replace the installed port with a port	from a different origin

It's from the man pages.

--Chris
